name: flow
description: The /flow engine — one unified, PM-agnostic workflow system spanning capture → done. Manual stages and an autonomous loop seated on DorkOS Pulse.
author: DorkOS

config.description: Resolved configuration defaults (§9). Validated by the Zod-generated config.schema.json (task 0.3).

skills.name: skills/
skills.description: Stage skills (gerund-named) + the linear-adapter — synced into .claude/skills/ via the harness symlink mechanism (registered by task 0.2). 8 skills registered in the harness manifest's flow bundle.

commands.name: commands/flow/
commands.description: Thin /flow + /flow:<stage> trigger commands. Claude-native — NOT synced; no repo-local command format exists for Cursor/Codex. Created in P1.

hooks.name: unified-loop-hook
hooks.description: The unified loop hook lives in .claude/settings.json (hookPolicies projection: none per the harness-sync spec). Wired in P2.

templates.name: templates/
templates.description: records/ (PM records by type: idea/research/hypothesis/task/project) · docs/ (ideation/specification/03-tasks.json/ADR scaffolds) · pr.md. Loaded by skills; not projected. See templates/README.md.

docs.name: CHARTER.md
docs.description: The north star: the 15 goals (G1–G15) and their conformance criteria the system is audited against. Locked v1.0 (2026-06-25). Charter G15 — docs travel with the package.

docs.name: README.md
docs.description: The operator manual: the stage spine, the trigger×mode 2×2, the command↔state map, the gates, the adapter seam, autonomous mode + the server dependency, configuration, and templates.

docs.name: SPEC.md
docs.description: The contract + promotion surface: the stage model, the typed PMClient / WorkItem / FlowRun, the @dorkos/flow decision oracles, the config schema reference, and the P5 boundary.

docs.name: guides/
docs.description: The published guide series (Fumadocs MDX, rendered by apps/site): what-flow-is · driving-it-manually · turning-on-autonomy · the-dials · how-it-works. Registered in docs/guides/meta.json. The user-facing reference half of charter G15.
